+/* === Policy Pages (Shipping, Returns) === */
+.policy-content{max-width:800px;margin:0 auto}
+.policy-section{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:24px;margin-bottom:16px;transition:border-color .3s}
+.policy-section:hover{border-color:var(--pr)}
+.policy-section h3{font-family:'Archivo Black',sans-serif;font-size:18px;margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--ac)}
+.policy-section p{font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:8px}
+.policy-section strong{color:var(--text)}
+.policy-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin-top:12px}
+.policy-table th{text-align:left;padding:10px 14px;background:rgba(0,191,255,.1);color:var(--pr);font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--border)}
+.policy-table td{padding:10px 14px;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05)}
+.policy-table tr:hover td{color:var(--text);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02)}
+.policy-list{padding-left:20px;margin:8px 0}
+.policy-list li{font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);line-height:2;padding-left:4px}
+
+/* ===== RESPONSIVE: Tablet (768px and below) ===== */
+@media(max-width:768px){
+  nav{padding:0 16px}
+  .nav-in{height:60px;gap:10px}
+  .nav-logo{height:50px}
+  .nav-center{display:none;position:absolute;top:60px;left:0;right:0;background:rgba(5,5,5,.97);flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding:20px 0;gap:0;border-top:1px solid var(--border);z-index:101}
+  .nav-center a{padding:14px 0;width:100%;text-align:center;font-size:14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05)}
+  .mob-menu{display:block}
+  .search-box{width:120px;font-size:12px;padding:6px 10px 6px 30px}
+  .cart-b{padding:8px 14px;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px}
+
+  .hero{padding-top:80px}
+  .hero-graf-logo{width:min(280px,70vw)}
+  .h-title{font-size:clamp(28px,7vw,52px)}
+  .h-sub{font-size:13px}
+  .hero-stickers{display:none}
+
+  .shop{padding:30px 16px}
+  .shop-head{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;margin-bottom:24px}
+  .shop-title{font-size:26px}
+  .shop-ctrl{width:100%;overflow-x:auto;flex-wrap:nowrap;gap:6px}
+  .fb{padding:6px 14px;font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap}
+  .sort-sel{padding:6px 10px;font-size:11px}
+
+  .product-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px}
+  .pc-img{height:200px}
+  .pc-info{padding:12px}
+  .pc-name{font-size:13px}
+  .pc-price{font-size:16px}
+  .pc-old{font-size:11px}
+  .pc-add{padding:6px 10px;font-size:10px}
+
+  .modal-g{grid-template-columns:1fr}
+  .modal-img{min-height:280px}
+  .modal-inf{padding:20px 16px}
+  .modal-nm{font-size:22px}
+  .modal-pr{font-size:22px}
+  .modal-x{font-size:32px;top:10px;right:12px;width:40px;height:40px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
+  .modal-thumbs img{width:50px;height:50px}
+
+  .cart-d{width:100%;right:-100%}
+  .cart-d.open{right:0}
+
+  .v-marquee{display:none}
+  .graf-tag{display:none}
+  .vcr-badge{left:12px;bottom:12px;font-size:10px}
+  .toast{left:16px;right:16px;bottom:16px;text-align:center;font-size:12px}
+
+  .pg-wrap{padding:0 16px}
+  .ab-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
+  .ct-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
+
+  .trk-search{flex-direction:column}
+  .trk-step-label{font-size:9px}
+}
+
+/* ===== RESPONSIVE: Small Phones (480px and below) ===== */
+@media(max-width:480px){
+  .product-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:16px}
+  .pc-img{height:240px}
+  .pc-name{font-size:14px}
+  .pc-price{font-size:18px}
+  .pc-add{padding:8px 14px;font-size:11px}
+
+  .shop-title{font-size:22px;letter-spacing:1px}
+  .modal-nm{font-size:20px}
+  .modal-pr{font-size:20px}
+  .modal-desc{font-size:13px}
+  .modal-add{font-size:14px;padding:14px}
+  .modal-ov{padding:0}
+  .modal-c{max-height:100vh;border-radius:0}
+
+  .h-title{font-size:clamp(24px,6vw,40px)}
+  .hero-graf-logo{width:min(240px,75vw)}
+  .h-cta{font-size:14px;padding:14px 32px}
+
+  .loading-t{font-size:22px}
+  .loading-b{width:220px;height:18px}
+
+  .marq-in span{font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px}
+}

+function getProductReviews(productId, callback) {
+  var safeId = productId.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, '_');
+  if(reviewsCache[safeId]) {
+    if(callback) callback(reviewsCache[safeId]);
+    return reviewsCache[safeId];
+  }
+  if(!window.db) { if(callback) callback([]); return []; }
+  window.db.collection('reviews').doc(safeId).collection('entries').orderBy('timestamp','desc').get().then(function(snapshot) {
+    var reviews = [];
+    snapshot.forEach(function(doc) { reviews.push(doc.data()); });
+    reviewsCache[safeId] = reviews;
+    if(callback) callback(reviews);
+  }).catch(function(err) {
+    console.error('Error fetching reviews:', err);
+    if(callback) callback([]);
+  });
+  return reviewsCache[safeId] || [];
+}
+function saveProductReview(productId, review, callback) {
+  var safeId = productId.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, '_');
+  if(!window.db) {
+    console.warn('Firebase not loaded, saving to localStorage fallback');
+    var local = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('db_reviews_' + safeId) || '[]');
+    local.push(review);
+    localStorage.setItem('db_reviews_' + safeId, JSON.stringify(local));
+    if(callback) callback();
+    return;
+  }
+  review.timestamp = firebase.firestore.FieldValue.serverTimestamp();
+  window.db.collection('reviews').doc(safeId).collection('entries').add(review).then(function() {
+    delete reviewsCache[safeId]; // Clear cache so next read is fresh
+    if(callback) callback();
+  }).catch(function(err) {
+    console.error('Error saving review:', err);
+    if(callback) callback();
+  });
+}
+function getAvgRating(productId) {
+  var safeId = productId.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/g, '_');
+  var reviews = reviewsCache[safeId] || [];
+  if (!reviews.length) return { avg: 0, count: 0 };
+  var sum = reviews.reduce(function(s, r) { return s + r.rating; }, 0);
+  return { avg: sum / reviews.length, count: reviews.length };
+}

+
+function renderModalReviews(productId) {
+  var container = document.getElementById('modalReviews');
+  container.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;padding:20px;color:var(--muted)">Loading reviews...</div>';
+  
+  getProductReviews(productId, function(reviews) {
+    var rv = getAvgRating(productId);
+    var html = '<h3 style="font-family:Oswald;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:16px;margin-bottom:12px">Reviews</h3>';
+    
+    if(rv.count > 0) {
+      html += '<div style="margin-bottom:16px;font-size:13px;color:var(--muted)">Average: '+stars(rv.avg)+' ('+rv.count+' review'+(rv.count!==1?'s':'')+')</div>';
+    }
+    
+    // Review form
+    html += '<div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:20px">';
+    html += '<div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--ac)">Leave a Review</div>';
+    html += '<div style="margin-bottom:10px"><input id="reviewName" type="text" placeholder="Your Name" style="width:100%;padding:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);font-family:IBM Plex Mono,monospace;font-size:13px;border-radius:4px;outline:none;box-sizing:border-box"></div>';
+    html += '<div style="margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px"><span style="font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px">Rating:</span>';
+    for(var i=1;i<=5;i++) {
+      html += '<span class="rv-star-pick" data-val="'+i+'" onclick="document.querySelectorAll(\'.rv-star-pick\').forEach(function(s){s.style.color=parseInt(s.dataset.val)<='+i+'?\'var(--ac)\':\'var(--muted)\';});document.getElementById(\'reviewRating\').value='+i+'" style="cursor:pointer;font-size:22px;color:var(--muted);transition:color .15s">★</span>';
+    }
+    html += '<input type="hidden" id="reviewRating" value="0"></div>';
+    html += '<div style="margin-bottom:10px"><textarea id="reviewText" placeholder="Write your review..." rows="3" style="width:100%;padding:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text);font-family:IBM Plex Mono,monospace;font-size:13px;border-radius:4px;outline:none;resize:vertical;box-sizing:border-box"></textarea></div>';
+    html += '<button onclick="submitReview(\''+productId.replace(/'/g,"\\'")+'\')" style="padding:10px 24px;background:var(--ac);color:var(--bg);border:none;font-family:Archivo Black,sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;border-radius:4px;transition:background .2s">Submit Review</button>';
+    html += '</div>';
+    
+    // Existing reviews
+    if(reviews.length > 0) {
+      reviews.forEach(function(r) {
+        html += '<div class="rv"><div class="rv-h"><strong>'+r.name+'</strong><span class="rv-stars">'+stars(r.rating)+'</span></div><p>'+r.text+'</p><div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px">'+r.date+'</div></div>';
+      });
+    } else {
+      html += '<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;padding:16px">No reviews yet. Be the first!</div>';
+    }
+    
+    container.innerHTML = html;
+  });
+}
+
+function submitReview(productId) {
+  var name = document.getElementById('reviewName').value.trim();
+  var rating = parseInt(document.getElementById('reviewRating').value);
+  var text = document.getElementById('reviewText').value.trim();
+  
+  if(!name) { showToast('Please enter your name'); return; }
+  if(!rating || rating < 1) { showToast('Please select a star rating'); return; }
+  if(!text) { showToast('Please write a review'); return; }
+  
+  var review = {
+    name: name,
+    rating: rating,
+    text: text,
+    date: new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' })
+  };
+  
+  showToast('Submitting review...');
+  saveProductReview(productId, review, function() {
+    renderModalReviews(productId);
+    
+    // Update modal header rating after cache refreshes
+    setTimeout(function() {
+      var rv = getAvgRating(productId);
+      if(rv.count > 0) {
+        document.getElementById('modalRating').innerHTML = stars(rv.avg)+' <span class="rc">('+rv.count+' review'+(rv.count!==1?'s':'')+')</span>';
+      }
+      renderProducts();
+    }, 500);
+    
+    showToast('Review submitted! Thank you 🔥');
+  });
+}
